overview: Dr. Lerner, a board-certified pediatric endocrinologist, provides in-depth educational consultations to parents about their child's endocrine diagnoses. Each two-hour appointment involves reviewing the child's medical records and answering comprehensive questions to empower parents in partnering with their child's medical team.
highlights: Expertise in medications, supplements, and alternative therapies
targetAudience: Parents seeking comprehensive education about their child's endocrine condition beyond what standard medical appointments provide.
